缉毒警察李梦，为护战友扑向手雷，壮烈牺牲。
一睁眼，竟穿越到士兵突击世界，成了草原五班最混的兵 ——李梦！
开局觉醒百倍修炼加成！
训练效果 ×100，体能 ×100，射击 ×100，战术 ×100，万物皆可百倍！
别人玩命训练，他随便练练：
万米跑直接刷爆集团军记录！
练枪两个半小时，打服师部第一神枪手！
老 A 选拔乱杀全场，袁朗惊到失态：
“三分钟，我要他全部资料！”
高成：“他真是草原五班出来的兵？这是怪物吧！”
小庄拜师：“连长，求教我战术思维！”
蒋小鱼跪服：“水下闭气三十分钟？您还是人吗？”
从此，龙国多了一尊战场杀神 —— 龙牙！
伏击毒贩，一枪一个，爆头十一名匪徒；
深入敌后，白磷弹焚尽一切罪恶；
湄公河、红海、边境缉毒…… 哪里有危险，哪里就有他的传说！
从草原五班混子，一路平推成特种兵司令员！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oe2067d1edf51d36a209b6a23205b14bd~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"乌托邦","author_id":"","book_id":"7592799978569862168","book_name":"特种兵：百倍成效，我夯爆全军","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303828","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3390人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":375,"name":"特种兵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=375&name=特种兵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1058,"name":"综影视","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1058&name=综影视&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7592831982897807896","read_count":"3390","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"212478"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"95","tags":"男频衍生,特种兵,无敌,同人,综影视,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oe2067d1edf51d36a209b6a23205b14bd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779177530&x-signature=gPf%2Bcs%2B5eUbFSd5DirEbCRIiHyU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"61865030125","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"59"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032015584949182A68C2291008F5CB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_cou
